original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch on the document, showing two views of a disc-shaped object.

elements.description: The word 'CONFIDENITAL' (spelled with an 'I') stamped at the top center of the page.

A hand-drawn sketch at the bottom of the page depicting a UFO or flying disc from two perspectives. The sketch includes a 'Side View' showing a thin, slightly curved shape and a 'Top' view showing a wider, shield-like or saucer shape. Text above the sketch reads: 'Seemed to travel in sidewise position and did not appear to whirl or spin'. Text below and to the right of the sketch reads: 'They seemed longer than wide thickness being about 1/20 of width'. An arrow points downward from the top view sketch.
The word 'CONFIDENITAL' (spelled with an 'I') stamped again at the bottom center of the page.

judge.reason: Both agree on a hand-drawn sketch of a disc-shaped object from two perspectives, but Description B adds specific quoted text and details not present in Description A.
